extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: I counted only the “Against the Company” row for statutory/regulatory proceedings (1) and tax proceedings (20), while the criminal count is nil for the Company, directors and promoters; all “By” rows were excluded. The separate disciplinary-actions-by-SEBI/Stock-Exchanges column for promoters and the promoter criminal matter are not included in the issuer-directed criminal or statutory/regulatory counts, and promoter/director tax rows are excluded from the company-group tax count. The total litigation amount uses the explicitly stated “Against the Company” aggregate of ₹1,134.51 lakhs, rather than summing sub-items; this is ₹113.451 crore (1,134.51 lakhs ÷ 100), and is the company amount shown in the table. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹1,134.51 lakhs as of June 30, 2023, converted to ₹113.451 crore; the source tables use lakhs. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer revenue concentration is disclosed: the percentages shown concern suppliers, not customers, and the revenue percentages elsewhere are geography or business-category concentrations.
